# Crimson Rite Conduit

## Tier 2 Support

A ritual conduit who sustains the cult through blood rites, shared suffering, and unwavering devotion.

**Motives & Tactics:** Sustain allied cultists, exploit targets, preserve the Cult at any cost

> Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 10/20 | HP: 4 | Stress 5
> ATK: +1 | Scepter: Far | 2d8+1 mag
> Experience: Rituals +2, Healer +1

## Features

**Communion of Pain - Action:** Spend a Fear to have an ally within Very Close range clear 1d4 HP. You can also mark a Stress to have them clear a Stress.

**Feed the Spiral - Action:** Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, if they are [_Spiraling_](/mechanics/conditions/), they must mark a Stress.

**Final Benediction - Reaction:** When the Conduit is defeated, an ally within Close range clears 1 HP.
